Ready

Try: "scroll down", "click search", "go back"

Voice Commands

  • "Scroll down" Scroll page down
  • "Scroll up" Scroll page up
  • "Click [text]" Click element with text
  • "Go back" Browser back
  • "Go forward" Browser forward
  • "Refresh" Reload page
  • "Search [query]" Search on current site
  • "Summarize" Summarize page content
  • "Headings" List all headings
  • "Links" List all links
  • "Read this" Read focused element
  • "Stop" Stop speaking
